creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Thanks, and belated thanks to fernape@ for <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/59e3915e5ca57b7a1be87a01f909929d554d6626> – I did find the current section of the primer very useful, in recent weeks, after I began learning about mdoc. 

Incidentally, from recent <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2023-August/002438.html>: 

> … 
> deroff(1) removes a little too much; 
> <https://reviews.freebsd.org/P600$148-153>.
> 
> …

Over to freebsd-hackers, please, for anyone who'd like to continue the broader discussion, which had a spell-checking context.
